clips.title: The Campfire
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A campsite at night in the woods. The scene is lit entirely by a crackling campfire, warm orange firelight flickering on the person's face and the trees, deep night beyond. A person in an outdoor jacket sits by the fire. Warm flickering firelight, dancing orange glow, deep night, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
